summary: CMR (Custom Milled Rice) Milling Module Phase 1 - Complete testing. All backend APIs working correctly: milling-entries CRUD, paddy-stock, milling-summary, byproduct-stock, byproduct-sales. Frontend UI fully functional with correct data-testid attributes. Auto-calculations verified: husk% = 100 - (rice% + bran% + kunda% + broken% + kanki%), CMR = rice + FRK, outturn = CMR/paddy*100. FRK is correctly treated as purchased separately (not percentage-based).

issues: Warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement recommended

seed_data_creation: Test entries created and deleted during testing - no residual test data
context_for_next_testing_agent: CMR Milling Module Phase 1 fully tested. Key APIs: POST/GET/PUT/DELETE /api/milling-entries, GET /api/paddy-stock, GET /api/milling-summary, GET /api/byproduct-stock, POST/GET/DELETE /api/byproduct-sales. FRK is purchased separately (frk_purchased_qntl, frk_purchase_rate), NOT percentage-based. Auto-calculations work correctly. Frontend uses data-testid attributes: tab-milling, subtab-milling, subtab-byproducts, milling-add-btn, milling-form-dialog, milling-form-paddy, milling-form-rice-pct, milling-form-frk-qty, milling-form-frk-rate, byproduct-stock-{product}, byproduct-sell-{product}, byproduct-add-sale, sale-form-dialog.

verified_business_logic.frk_treatment: FRK is purchased separately, NOT percentage-based
verified_business_logic.paddy_stock: available = total_paddy_in_qntl (from mill_entries mill_w) - total_paddy_used_qntl (from milling_entries)
